name: ivelin--email-resend
description: Send and receive emails using the Resend API. Use for: (1) sending emails directly via Resend API, (2) receiving email notifications via cron, (3) drafting replies with proper threading, (4) downloading attachments from inbound emails. **Required env vars:** RESEND_API_KEY (API key). **Optional env vars:** DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL, DEFAULT_FROM_NAME (fall back to preferences file if not set). **License: Apache-2.0** — See LICENSE file for details.
